t_ch: 「但我还在，{NICKNAME}还在，对吗？」
t_en: "But I'm still here, and {NICKNAME} is still here, no?"

t_ch: 「尽管『毁灭』的按钮已经被按下，但我们还有机会…改写它的意义。」
t_en: "Though the button of Destruction has been pressed, we still have a chance... to rewrite its meaning."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「终于，{RUBY_B#「记忆」浮黎}那位星神{RUBY_E#}向翁法罗斯投来视线了呀。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"{RUBY_B#Fuli the Remembrance}That Aeon{RUBY_E#}... finally cast THEIR eyes toward Amphoreus."</color>

t_ch: 「记忆」浮黎？
t_en: Fuli the Remembrance?

t_ch: 祂瞥视了翁法罗斯？
t_en: THEY glanced at Amphoreus?

t_ch: 「是呀。我想，祂也在等待这一刻，权杖『身心合一』的瞬间……」
t_en: "Yes. I imagine THEY have also been waiting for this moment, when the Scepter's 'body and heart become one'..."

t_ch: 铁墓是一艘完美的航船，若能暗中埋下种子，在「智识」被它引爆的瞬间，「记忆」也将遍布寰宇的每个角落。
t_en: Irontomb is a perfect ark. If a seed can be planted within, then the moment the Lord Ravager blows the Erudition to pieces, the Remembrance will be spread to every corner of the cosmos.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「这短暂而漫长的一瞬后，银河便将见证翁法罗斯的答案。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The cosmos will witness Amphoreus's answer after this fleeting yet eternal moment."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「而现在，就是我们写下最后一笔的时间。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"And now... It's time for us to pen the last stroke."</color>

t_ch: 「我看见，无数『记忆』飘荡在星空中。它们是受难者的心识，在现实的下一秒就会被『毁灭』污染。」
t_en: "I see endless 'memories' floating in the starry skies. They are the consciousnesses of the victims. In the cosmos's real space-time, they'll be stained by the Destruction in the next second."

t_ch: 「但现在，它们仍是纯洁的种子。将这些『记忆』捧在掌心，我就能创造出一片停滞的忆域。」
t_en: "But they are still pure seeds for now. If I hold these 'memories' in my hands, then I can create a stagnant Memory Zone."

t_ch: 「一片…小小的{RUBY_B#一页永恒}『善见天』{RUBY_E#}。」
t_en: "A tiny... {RUBY_B#Eternal Page}Eden of Blessed Insight{RUBY_E#}."

t_ch: 「我相信奇迹的花，会在其中绽放。」
t_en: "I believe a flower of miracles will bloom within."

t_ch: 我不会让你独自承受。
t_en: I won't have you shouldering this on your own.

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}…已经陪伴在人家身边啦。」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}... You're already right next to me."

t_ch: 我该如何去往你身边？
t_en: How am I supposed to reach you?

t_ch: 「是个好问题呀，我也不知道自己身在何方。」
t_en: "Good question. I don't know where I am, either."

t_ch: 「不过…{NICKNAME}已经陪伴在人家身边啦。」
t_en: "But... You're already right next to me, {NICKNAME}."

t_ch: 「就算在深不见底的虚空中，我依旧能听见你的声音。」
t_en: "I can still hear your voice in this bottomless void."

t_ch: 「看来，就算银河步入终结，我们也还是被一颗{RUBY_B#星核}心{RUBY_E#}相连呀。」
t_en: "Looks like we're still connected by one {RUBY_B#Stellaron}heart{RUBY_E#}, even as the cosmos reaches its end."

t_ch: 「既然如此，人家就不会害怕，也不会孤单。」
t_en: "In that case, I won't feel alone or be scared."

t_ch: 「因为在这刹那的永恒中，只要循着心中的『记忆』……」
t_en: "Because as long as you follow the 'memories' in your heart..."

t_ch: 「你一定能找到我的，对吧♪」
t_en: "You'll definitely find me in this fleeting eternity, right? ♪"

t_ch: 昔涟……
t_en: Cyrene...

t_ch: 你还在等什么，{NICKNAME}乘客？
t_en: What are you waiting for, passenger {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我怕你迷路，特意过来看看帕。
t_en: I specifically came over to check on you, in case you got lost.

t_ch: 帕姆？！你怎么在这…
t_en: Pom-Pom!? How did you get here...?

t_ch: 列车长？时间不是静止了吗…
t_en: The conductor? But I thought time itself had stopped...

t_ch: 我可是列车长。很奇怪么？
t_en: What's the big deal? Pom-Pom's the conductor, after all.

t_ch: 终于，你也踏上了这条路帕。
t_en: At long last, you've embarked on this road as well.

t_ch: 很久以前，祂也和你一样，站在道路的起点犹豫不决。所以我过来，只是为了给你一句话——
t_en: Many, many years ago, THEY were standing at the start of the road in hesitation, just like you are right now. So Pom-Pom came over to give you one message...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>奔跑吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Run.</color>

t_ch: 什么都不用管，奔跑吧。哪怕全银河都停下了脚步，所有人都被黑暗绊倒……
t_en: Don't think about anything else. Just run. Even if the entire cosmos has stopped. Even if everyone else is tripped by the darkness...

t_ch: 你也要继续奔跑下去，把自己想象成列车，向前奔驰。
t_en: You still need to keep running. Picture yourself as the Express, moving forward at full speed.

t_ch: 因为，这就是「开拓」的意义。
t_en: Because that's what the Trailblaze means.

t_ch: 我会追上昔涟，改写结局。
t_en: I will catch up to Cyrene and rewrite the ending.

t_ch: 毕竟，我是最棒的无名客。
t_en: After all, I am the best Nameless.

t_ch: 不会让你失望的，列车长。
t_en: I won't disappoint you, conductor.

t_ch: 那就准备好，列车长要给你出发的口令了。
t_en: Then get ready. The conductor will be giving you the signal to depart.

t_ch: 注意，注意！银河里的各位乘客，请在月台上站稳！
t_en: Attention~ Attention all passengers in the cosmos. Please stand steady on the platform!

t_ch: 星穹列车，马上就要进站了。途经站点：「智识」、「毁灭」、「记忆」——
t_en: The Astral Express is about to arrive. Calling at: the Erudition, the Destruction, and the Remembrance!

t_ch: 终点站：「开拓」！
t_en: Final destination: the Trailblaze!

t_ch: 五、四、三、二、一……
t_en: Five, four, three, two, one...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>向着明天，出发吧！</size></color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff><size=28>We depart... for tomorrow!</size></color>

t_ch: 世界前所未有地安静，真好呀，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
t_en: The world has never been so quiet. It's so good... It's as if I can hear the sound of my heart beating.

t_ch: 要记得这个瞬间呀，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Remember this moment, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 如果记忆中的风景模糊了，就伸手去触碰它吧。
t_en: If the view in your memory ever grows fuzzy, just reach out and touch it.

t_ch: 然后，让它重新成为心灵的力量。
t_en: Then, restore its power to nourish the spirit.

t_ch: 你是？我是…是谁？
t_en: You are? I am... Who?

t_ch: 你…温暖。温暖，喜欢。
t_en: You... warm. Me like, warmth.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯之心……
t_en: Amphoreus's Heart...

t_ch: 我追上你了。
t_en: I've caught up to you.

t_ch: 最初的光，照亮混沌吧。
t_en: Let the first light illuminate chaos.

t_ch: 真是…安静呀。
t_en: It's... so quiet.

t_ch: 一切都静止在美好的瞬间，这座花园就是你的「记忆」……
t_en: Everything's frozen in the most beautiful moment. This garden is your "memory"...

t_ch: 昔涟，我来了。
t_en: I'm here, Cyrene.

t_ch: 「记忆的种子」……
t_en: "Seed of Memory"...

t_ch: 这些忆质，是被昔涟接纳的…银河众生的「记忆」。
t_en: These memoria are what Cyrene took in... They're the "memories" of all of the cosmos's lifeforms.

t_ch: 为了保护它们，她的「自我」已经如此稀薄了么？
t_en: Did her "sense of self" already become so weak in order to protect them?

t_ch: 「你的命途性质很特殊，绝不会只是『忆灵』这么简单。但有一件事我可以确定——」
t_en: "The Path characteristic you exhibit is very special. There's no way you're just a simple 'memosprite.' However, I'm sure about one thing..."

t_ch: 「你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于『记忆』命途而成长的模因。」
t_en: "You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance."

t_ch: 「这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……」
t_en: "That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus..."

t_ch: 「做好最坏的打算——你会消失在忆域中，连一行数字都不会留下。」
t_en: "Then you must be prepared for the worst. You will disappear in the Memory Zone, utterly gone, without even a single line of data to remember you by."

t_ch: 既然如此……
t_en: In that case...

t_ch: 让我一同铭记银河吧。
t_en: Let me remember the cosmos with you.

t_ch: 这样一来，它们就不再是你一个人的回忆。
t_en: That way, it won't just be your memories alone.

t_ch: 「到此为止了吗？该死！明明还有弹药！」
t_en: "Is this it? Darn it! We've still got ammo!"

t_ch: 「快无法抑制了！保命要紧！撤离——」
t_en: "It's getting out of control! Run for your lives! Retreat..."

t_ch: 「*粗口*，守住防线！不计代价——」
t_en: "Hold the line! At all costs...!"

t_ch: 「伤员，太多了…已经不行了……」
t_en: "Too many... injured... can't take it anymore..."

t_ch: 记忆…好沉重……
t_en: These memories... are so heavy...

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}…记忆……」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}... memories..."

t_ch: 感觉…轻松些了吗？
t_en: Do you feel... better now?

t_ch: 「要坚持住啊，『救世主』。」
t_en: "Hang in there, 'Deliverer.'"

t_ch: 「我总算明白了，机器头计算的『时刻』不是『毁灭』……」
t_en: "I finally get it now. The 'Instants' Droidhead calculated aren't about the Destruction..."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「祂想验证的，是银河『死而后生』的答案。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"What THEY want to prove is how the cosmos would 'come back after being destroyed.'"</color>

t_ch: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
t_en: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

t_ch: 「当『记忆』与『开拓』交汇，带领我们见证奇迹吧。」
t_en: "When the Remembrance converges with the Trailblaze, lead us to witness the miracle."

t_ch: 当然……
t_en: Of course I will...

t_ch: 我…不会放弃。
t_en: I... won't give up.

t_ch: 「神经中枢无响应。神经中枢无响应……」
t_en: "Nervous center not responding. Nervous center not responding..."

t_ch: 「每天都这么多破事？毁灭吧，统统都毁灭——」
t_en: "Every day it's the same nonsense! The world is better off destroyed... every single thing—"

t_ch: 「这片惨状…终究，还是晚了一步么……」
t_en: "Look at this mess... were we still too late...?"

t_ch: 「看啊，他的眼睛…多漂亮……」
t_en: "See how beautiful his eyes are..."

t_ch: 「欢迎来到这个世界，我的孩子。你将迎来许许多多个明天……」
t_en: "Welcome to this world, my child. You'll see so many tomorrows..."

t_ch: 「是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？」
t_en: "It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Did I really change that much?"

t_ch: 哈…哈……
t_en: Hah... Hah...

t_ch: 还有…多少记忆……
t_en: How many... more... memories...

t_ch: 「累了吗，{NICKNAME}？」
t_en: "Tired, {NICKNAME}?"

t_ch: 「那就小憩一会儿吧，没人会指责你的。」
t_en: "Then take a break. No one's gonna blame you."

t_ch: 卡芙卡…？
t_en: Kafka...?

t_ch: 「鼓舞的话，就不必由我来说了。」
t_en: "You don't need me to give you words of encouragement."

t_ch: 「我只想告诉你一件事，有关翁法罗斯这一站的意义——」
t_en: "So I just want to tell you one thing. I'll tell you the purpose of your stop at Amphoreus."

t_ch: 「你将与一位无漏净子相遇，教会她何为『爱』，然后，第一次直面『毁灭』。」
t_en: "On that trip, you will encounter a Pure Child of Anāsrava, teach her what 'love' is, and then you will directly face the Destruction for the first time."

t_ch: 「接下来，你的选择会将命运一分为二：在更坏的可能性里，『开拓』的旅途将变成一段完美无缺的『记忆』。」
t_en: "From this point, your choice will split destiny in twain. In the darker of the two outcomes, the Trailblazing journey will turn into a flawless 'memory.'"

t_ch: 「星穹列车经历的一切，你的一切，都会被她悉心保存、呵护，直到那场壮丽的神战，她将怀抱着『爱』，在时间的尽头飞升成因果的主人。」
t_en: "She will carefully treasure and protect everything you and the Astral Express have experienced, until that magnificent war between the gods when she, with 'love' in her heart, will ascend at the end of time to become the master of causality."

t_ch: 「宇宙在『毁灭』中熄灭，而你和她，从此成为『善见天』的始和终。」
t_en: "The universe will be snuffed out in the Destruction, and you and she will become the beginning and the end of the Eden of Blessed Insight."

t_ch: 「唯二的生命，存在于永恒的过去、现在，未来，播下恒河沙的种子，修剪阿僧祇的枝叶，收获那由他的鲜花。」
t_en: "You shall become the only two lives in all of existence, and you shall live in an eternal past, present, and future. You shall sow as many seeds as the sands of Gaṅgā, trim an asaṃkhyeya of leaves, and harvest a nayuta of flowers."

t_ch: 「这便是银河的第四种『终末』——『记忆』。」
t_en: "That is the cosmos's fourth kind of 'Finality': the Remembrance."

t_ch: 「但现在，你仍有机会做出选择。」
t_en: "But for now, you still have a chance to make a choice."

t_ch: 「你的『开拓』之路还很长，孩子。我尽量长话短说。」
t_en: "You still have a long way to go on your trailblazing journey, child. I'll keep this brief."

t_ch: 「旅程才刚刚开始。我，瓦尔特，还有其他同伴，有许多秘密还没有告诉你。」
t_en: "The journey has only just begun. Welt, our other companions, and I still have many secrets we've yet to share with you."

t_ch: 「是不是有些好奇了？但之所以会把故事放在心里，是因为相信来日方长。」
t_en: "So, aren't you curious? We kept these stories to ourselves because we believed we had a long future ahead of us."

t_ch: 「哪怕银河尺度的危机，尘埃落定后，也只是一段旅程的回忆，漫长航线上的一点。」
t_en: "Even a cosmos-spanning crisis, once the dust has settled, is nothing more than a memory of the journey... A single point on our long road."

t_ch: 「总有一天，我们会把所有心事倾囊相诉，娓娓道来。为了那一天……」
t_en: "There will come a day when we tell each other everything. So, for the sake of that day..."

t_ch: 「不要放弃。」
t_en: "Don't give up."

t_ch: 「我们都清楚，你会做出何种决定。我也相信，剧本不会走向错误的结局。」
t_en: "We all know what kind of decision you'll make, and I believe the script will not progress toward the wrong ending."

t_ch: 「所以，放轻松，听我说——当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
t_en: "So, relax. Listen: When you have the chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."

t_ch: 「继续前进，继续『开拓』吧。」
t_en: "Keep moving forward. Keep 'Trailblazing.'"

t_ch: 「当明日到来，再将你亲手创造的奇迹同我分享。」
t_en: "And when tomorrow comes, share with me the miracle you've created with your own hands."

t_ch: 我会…抵达明天。
t_en: I... will reach tomorrow.

t_ch: 「列车上见，孩子。」
t_en: "See you on the Express, kid."

t_ch: 「命运中见，{NICKNAME}。」
t_en: "See you in destiny, {NICKNAME}."

t_ch: 「神谕已经降下，翁法罗斯将飞向星空！」
t_en: "The prophecy has arrived. Amphoreus will fly into the starry skies!"

t_ch: 「预言从不落空。『救世主』将自神战中凯旋！」
t_en: "The prophecy never falters. The 'Deliverer' will return victorious from the war of gods!"

t_ch: 「天外的世界，从来都不是谎言。」
t_en: "The world beyond the sky was never a lie."

t_ch: 「战争结束后，我要和粉霞天女一起，周游群星！」
t_en: "When the war is over, I'm gonna travel all over the stars with the Rosy Celestial Maiden!"

t_ch: 「只顾低头锻造，三千万世。」
t_en: "For thirty million cycles. Always kept my head down. Forging."

t_ch: 「凝望天空，只此一次。」
t_en: "Gazing up at the sky. This is the only time."

t_ch: 「莉维娅，快看！天上有一道红色的光，好漂亮！」
t_en: "Livia, look! There's a red light in the sky! It's so pretty!"

t_ch: 「真希望有一天，我也能到星间旅行！」
t_en: "I wish I could go journey among the stars one day!"

t_ch: 昔涟…醒来吧……
t_en: Cyrene... Wake up...

t_ch: 我们…一起……
t_en: Together... We will...

t_ch: 踏上「记忆」的命途！
t_en: Tread on the Path of Remembrance!

t_ch: 「难怪我总有种预感。这样一来，也算应验了人家一直以来的观点。」
t_en: "No wonder I always had a weird hunch... But that also means I was right in thinking..."

t_ch: 「只要和{NICKNAME}一起……」
t_en: "As long as {NICKNAME} and I are together..."

t_ch: 我们就什么都做得到♪
t_en: "We can do anything ♪"

t_ch: {NICKNAME}的肩膀，真的很可靠呀。
t_en: {NICKNAME}'s shoulders are really dependable.

t_ch: 这话应该我来说。
t_en: That should have been my line.

t_ch: 我…成功了吗？
t_en: Did I... do it?

t_ch: 当然。没有落下一丝涟漪哦？
t_en: Of course you did. And you didn't leave a single ripple behind.

t_ch: 简单，轻轻松松。
t_en: Easy-peasy.

t_ch: 如今，数以亿万计的心识，正在你我的胸膛里流淌。
t_en: Now, countless consciousnesses are flowing in our hearts.

t_ch: 还走得动吗，{NICKNAME}？我们…该去完成真正的「创世」啦。
t_en: Can you still move, {NICKNAME}? It's time... for us to complete the real "genesis."

t_ch: 在铁墓的恨意吞没一切的瞬间，一道目光看向了我。
t_en: In the instant Irontomb's hatred devoured everything, a gaze fell upon me.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#浮黎}「记忆」{RUBY_E#}…在「昔涟」梦中出现的神明。祂的身影和话语都模糊不清……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Fuli}The Remembrance{RUBY_E#}... That was the god who appeared in "Cyrene's" dream. THEIR figure and speech were both so blurred...

t_ch: <color=#b9effff>你我曾是不是神明人子因罪行祝福降临陨落凡间经你我之手写下抹去的诗将是曾是你我在善见天的记忆忘却。</color>
t_en: <color=#b9effff>you/i were/weren't once progeny of deities cast/fallen to the mortal realm for blessings/sins the verses written/erased by your/my hands were/shall be your/my remembrance/oblivion in the eden of blessed insight.</color>

t_ch: 但在祂的注视下，我得以汇聚被「毁灭」侵染的「记忆」，写下这永恒的一页。
t_en: But while THEY gazed at me, I was able to collect all the "memories" stained by the Destruction and write down this eternal page.

t_ch: 而现在，我们要用这片宁静，净化铁墓的怒火。
t_en: And now, we will use this tranquility to cleanse Irontomb's rage.

t_ch: 怎么做？
t_en: How?

t_ch: 很简单。就像它一直对我们做的，只是反过来。
t_en: Simple. Just like what it was doing to us all this time, but reversed.

t_ch: 可别忘了呀？人家是「翁法罗斯的心灵」。身为「因子」的大家，他们力量的归宿现在不止铁墓一处——
t_en: Did you forget? I'm "Amphoreus's Heart." For everyone who's a "factor," their power isn't tied solely to Irontomb anymore. It has other places to go.

t_ch: 就将三千万世的记忆凝聚到我们身上，让权杖得出它被篡改以前的答案吧？
t_en: Let thirty million cycles of memories be condensed upon us, and let the Scepter reach the answer it had before it was distorted.

t_ch: 让铁墓成为空白，意味着…
t_en: To turn Irontomb blank means...

t_ch: 所有因子，还有你，必须…
t_en: All the factors... and you... must all...

t_ch: 「这意味着，我们会踏上真正的英雄之旅。」
t_en: "It means we will embark on the true Hero's Journey."

t_ch: 「如果铁墓的力量，来自对一切原动力的否定。」
t_en: "If Irontomb's power comes from the denial of all Primum Mobiles,"

t_ch: 「那就由我们，将信念践行。」
t_en: "Then we will carry out those beliefs."

t_ch: 「以此论证：即便生命归于熵增……」
t_en: "Here we argue: Even if all life eventually returns to increasing entropy..."

t_ch: 「它也会努力活着，努力…与『毁灭』抗争。」
t_en: "Life will still try its hardest to find a way... It will try its hardest to resist Destruction."

t_ch: 「在被黑潮笼罩的夜晚，我们是助长火焰的柴薪。」
t_en: "In the nights shrouded by the black tide, we are the kindling that makes the fire burn bright."

t_ch: 「但火烧得够旺，就能反客为主！」
t_en: "And once the fire is strong enough, the hunter will become the hunted!"

t_ch: 「如今，记忆中的逐火者…是『三千万世』乘以『十二』！」
t_en: "As of now, the number of Flame-Chasers in the memory... is 'thirty million' times 'twelve'!"

t_ch: 「而等待他们归还的火种，有四亿枚。」
t_en: "And four hundred million Coreflames await their return."

t_ch: 「我们能做到，对吗？」
t_en: "We can do it, right?"

t_ch: 「没错。所以相信我们吧，{NICKNAME}。所有人一起——」
t_en: "That's right. So, trust us, {NICKNAME}. Everyone! Let's head out together."

t_ch: 「去将这糟糕的结局——燃烧殆尽！」
t_en: "And we'll burn this horrible ending... to ashes!"

t_ch: 要用净世金血烧尽毁灭，对吗？
t_en: Exterminate the Destruction with the world-cleansing golden blood, right?

t_ch: 你早就预见到这一刻了，对吗？
t_en: You saw this coming all along, didn't you?

t_ch: 真是一段感伤，却又温暖的旅途呀。
t_en: ...What a poignant, yet warm journey.

t_ch: 而且还没结束，对吗？
t_en: And it's still not over yet... is it?

t_ch: 终于见面了呀，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: We finally meet, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 史诗的尾声，能在「记忆」的角落与「心中的英雄」相遇，还是在这么浪漫的星空下，人家也没有遗憾啦♪
t_en: To meet "The Hero Within" in a corner of "memories" at the saga's epilogue, and under such a romantic sky... I really don't have any more regrets ♪

t_ch: 还有……
t_en: On top of that...

t_ch: 那颗小小的种子，也长成高高的大树了呢。
t_en: The little seed had grown into such a big tree.

t_ch: 我现在，是不是特别漂亮呢？
t_en: Don't I look really pretty right now?

t_ch: 当然。开朗、美丽、乐观，就像是我幻想中…自己长大的样子。
t_en: Of course you do. Cheerful, beautiful, optimistic... Just how I imagined I'd look as a grown-up.

t_ch: 因为你留下的诗，被所有人温柔地续写着。
t_en: It's because everyone has been gently adding to the story you left behind.

t_ch: 我们约好了，重逢的时候，轮到我来为你讲一个故事。
t_en: Remember how we made a promise to one another? When we met again, it'd be my turn to tell you a story.

t_ch: 一个有关「爱」的故事，对吗？我一直在期待。
t_en: A story about "love," no? I've been looking forward to that.

t_ch: 那你一定还记得，水晶花和小妖精，我为你写下的第一首诗。
t_en: Then you must also remember the first story I wrote for you. The one about the crystal flower and the little fairy.

t_ch: 所以现在，我想为这个故事，还有你我，再添一笔。
t_en: So now, I want to add something more to this story and us.

t_ch: 花朵碎裂的那天，对着空荡荡的地面，我想…小妖精最终还是看见了光。
t_en: On that day that the flower shattered, gazing at the empty ground, I thought... the little fairy would finally see the light.

t_ch: 但它不在「无瑕」的花朵里，也不在妖精的眼睛里。
t_en: But that light wouldn't be found in the "flawless" flower, nor in the fairy's eyes.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而是在每一片破碎的水晶，映照出的世界里。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Rather, in the world mirrored within every fragment of the shattered crystal.</color>

t_ch: 所有逐火的人们，他们行走在你三千万次的讲述中。而这一刻，回忆交织在一起，所有前世过往都拥有了意义。
t_en: All the Flame-Chasers walk in your thirty million retellings of their story. At this moment, all the memories are tangled with each other, and all the previous cycles have gained meaning.

t_ch: 人们会明白，一次又一次，当站在命运的岔路口，他们不曾做出其他选择。
t_en: People will come to understand that, time and time again, when they stood at the crossroads of fate, they would never have chosen otherwise.

t_ch: 在「智识」的实验里，在「毁灭」的温床中，它是熵增，是冰冷的真理，罪恶的本能……
t_en: In the experiments of Erudition, and in the breeding ground of Destruction, it is entropy increasing, a merciless truth, an evil instinct...

t_ch: 但在「记忆」和「开拓」笔下……
t_en: But under the pen of the Remembrance and the Trailblaze...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>逐火是从不断失却，走向坚定舍却的旅途。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Flame-Chase is a journey that changes from constant losses to an unwavering act of release.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是知晓命运的破碎，仍以破碎拥抱命运，一段渴望被爱，更渴望去爱的旅途。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's about knowing how fate is shattered, yet still embracing fate's brokenness. It's a journey that longs to receive love, but longs even more to offer its love to others.</color>

t_ch: 真是听着就让人家怦怦心跳呀。
t_en: That's so heartwarming!

t_ch: 但是啊，以我的审美，会再加上小小的一笔呢。
t_en: But I'll add a small bit to suit my tastes.

t_ch: 我会写下：「爱」是一朵清白的花，它悄无声息地长大，让每一位过路的人都心生憧憬。
t_en: I'll write that "love" is an innocent flower. It grows up silently, creating longing in every passerby.

t_ch: 可是，花朵自己是无法走向天地的……
t_en: But the flower itself cannot walk into the world...

t_ch: 除非有人将「爱」栽种于心，带上它{RUBY_B#开拓}前往{RUBY_E#}明天，对吧？
t_en: Unless someone plants that "love" into their heart and {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}brings it with them{RUBY_E#} into tomorrow, right?

t_ch: 你已经完全学会啦。
t_en: You really have learned everything now.

t_ch: 那，就和这故事里所有的「花」一起……
t_en: Then, join all the other "flowers" in this story...

t_ch: 为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧♪
t_en: And let's write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love♪

t_ch: 那，你又是为何出发……
t_en: Then... why did you set out...

t_ch: 为何「开拓」？
t_en: Why do you "trailblaze"?
Who is it!?

t_ch: 别害怕，{NICKNAME}。紧张的时候，就牵住我的手吧。
t_en: Don't be afraid, {NICKNAME}. Take my hand if you feel nervous.

t_ch: 其实，人家一直都觉得你很了不起呀。毕竟「开拓」的道路也没有神明指引，只能由人一步步踏出……
t_en: Honestly, I've always thought you were really incredible. After all, no god guided the path of the Trailblaze. It could only be forged by those who dare to take their steps one at a time...

t_ch: 所以现在，就请你作为前辈，为翁法罗斯的大家言传身教吧？
t_en: So that's why I'm asking you... Step up as a senior, and show everyone in Amphoreus how it's done.

t_ch: 我为何「开拓」？只因目中所见，并无尽头。
t_en: I "trailblaze" because my own eyes have not seen the end.

t_ch: 但我不一样……
t_en: But I'm different...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我选择「开拓」，因为我已踏上此程！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I chose to "trailblaze" because I am already on this road!</color>

t_ch: 混沌的尽头，是一团纯粹的暗，纯粹的…「毁灭」。
t_en: The end of chaos is a mass of pure darkness, pure "Destruction."

t_ch: 但翁法罗斯的光有十三种颜色，我们可不会输给它，对吧？
t_en: However, Amphoreus's light has thirteen different colors. We won't lose to that darkness, will we?

t_ch: 那么，再做最后一次深呼吸吧，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Then, take a deep breath one last time, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 十三声心跳过后，{RUBY_B#爱}光{RUBY_E#}会创造天地。
t_en: After thirteen heartbeats... {RUBY_B#Love}Light{RUBY_E#} will create the heavens and earth.

t_ch: 准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Are you ready, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 嗯，继续前进吧。
t_en: Yes. Let's move forward.

t_ch: 让我再整理一下心情吧。
t_en: Let me take a moment to gather my thoughts.

t_ch: 求解「生命」的十三因子，汇入原初的混沌——
t_en: Seek the thirteen factors of "life," and let them converge into the primordial chaos—

t_ch: 以往昔的「记忆」，「开拓」来日的命运——
t_en: Using the Remembrance of the past, we will Trailblaze tomorrow's destiny—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>为「毁灭」灌注负世的「爱」——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Infusing a worldbearing "love" into Destruction—</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>为创世，镌写开篇的一笔！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And inscribe the opening stroke of genesis!</color>

t_ch: 「我知道，{NICKNAME}一定能找到这里。」
t_en: "I knew {NICKNAME}'d find this place."

t_ch: 「一如既往，走进人家的『心』。」
t_en: "And walk into my 'heart' as you've always done."

t_ch: 「那，就让我们各司其职吧？」
t_en: "Then, let us both do our duty."

t_ch: 「『开拓』前路的英雄，守望『记忆』的妖精……」
t_en: "The hero who Trailblazes the way forward and the fairy who watches over Remembrance..."

t_ch: 「果然，我们从来没有变呀♪」
t_en: "We never changed at all, did we? ♪"

t_ch: 从新生啼哭的黎明，到万物沉寂的黑夜……
t_en: From the dawn of newborn cries, to the night when all beings fall silent...

t_ch: 我们，是新世界的信使……
t_en: We are the messengers of the new world...

t_ch: 听潮声响起，让天地重生。
t_en: Listening to the call of the tides, and granting rebirth to heaven and earth.

t_ch: 然后，带领文明开创伟业。
t_en: Then, we lead civilization to glorious feats.

t_ch: 众神的诘问，将为人子解明。
t_en: The question imposed by the gods will be solved by the children of humanity.

t_ch: 告诉祂，逐火怎么可能是一场骗局？
t_en: We will tell THEM that the Flame-Chase can not possibly have been a lie.

t_ch: 西风的尽头，星光照亮花海……
t_en: When starlight illuminates the sea of flowers at the end of the west wind...

t_ch: 万物生机，也会从眠床中苏醒。
t_en: All living things will stir, roused from the cradle of sleep.

t_ch: 然后用一场斗争，让银河见证——
t_en: Then, through a single battle, let the cosmos witness.

t_ch: 以明亮的光，照亮盲目的黑暗。
t_en: How we light up the blinding darkness with bright light.

t_ch: 在不断失去的尽头，再度拾回一切！
t_en: And at the end of our constant losses, reclaim everything we have ever lost!

t_ch: 「身体」本就该受「心灵」的制约，不是么？哪怕灭世的病毒注定要被播撒向银河，我们至少能尝试以爱对抗憎恨……
t_en: The "body" is meant to be restrained by the "heart," no? Even if the apocalyptic virus is doomed to spread into the cosmos, we can at least try to fight against hatred with love...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>覆写铁墓「毁灭」的方程式，将它冲刷成一片「空白」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And overwrite Irontomb's Destruction equation, washing it away into a "blank space."</color>

t_ch: 踏上「记忆」命途。
t_en: Tread on the Path of Remembrance.

t_ch: 在「爱」的充盈下，挥洒光吧。
t_en: With an abundance of "love," let there be light.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>来吧，{NICKNAME}…银河在等待我们翻开下一页。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Come on, {NICKNAME}... The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>约好了，我们一起前进，{NICKNAME}。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>We promised each other to keep moving forward together, {NICKNAME}.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>别害怕，我会和你一起，为故事写下新的结局，和新的开始！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Don't be afraid. I'll be with you, writing both a new ending and a new beginning to this story!</color>

t_ch: 四亿史诗，以「我」成篇——
t_en: "I" shall compose four hundred million sagas—

t_ch: 逐火的命路——由我们改写！
t_en: We will rewrite the Flame-Chasers' path!

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 门关月，我令游离的足迹于此「同谐」——
t_en: In the Month of Gate, I command the wandering steps here to reach Harmony...

t_ch: 欢喜月，我举杯将「虚无」驱散——
t_en: In the Month of Joy, I lift my banqueting cup to dispel Nihility—...

t_ch: 平衡月，我让「秩序」成为自由的基石——
t_en: In the Month of Balance, I make Order the foundation of freedom...

t_ch: 亿万缕「记忆」——化作繁星照彻银河！
t_en: Trillions of "memories" will turn into stars and light up the cosmos!

t_ch: 浪漫的结局——由每一颗心书写！
t_en: A romantic ending will be penned by every beating heart!

t_ch: 以「爱」汇成长河——席卷「恨」的坟茔！
t_en: I converge "love" into a river that will drown the tomb of "hatred"!

t_ch: 拾线月，我吐露金丝编织「纯美」——
t_en: In the Month of Weaving, I extend golden threads to weave Beauty...

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 收获月，我教愚人启蒙「智识」——
t_en: In the Month of Reaping, I enlighten the foolish with luminary Erudition...

t_ch: 机缘月，我令「欢愉」遍洒黎明——
t_en: In the Month of Fortune, I scatter Elation throughout the dawning day...

t_ch: 纷争月，我成为永恒「巡猎」的荣光——
t_en: In the Month of Strife, I become the glory of the eternal Hunt...

t_ch: 哀悼月，我令死亡不再是「均衡」的终点——
t_en: In the Month of Mourning, I bid death to no longer be Equilibrium's end...

t_ch: 长昼月，我让晨昏变作「存护」的微光——
t_en: In the Month of Everday, I form twilight into the faint sparks of Preservation...

t_en: ▀█fetters█▀fate

t_ch: 哎呀，先停一停——
t_en: Oh! Hold on a second...

t_ch: 都说了，要前进的是我们♪
t_en: I told you already... We are the ones who will move forward ♪

t_ch: 耕耘月，我化作「不朽」的脊梁——
t_en: In the Month of Cultivation, I turn into the ridges and peaks of Permanence...

t_ch: 长夜月，我将「记忆」织作群星——
t_en: In the Month of Evernight, I weave Remembrance into countless stars in the sky...

t_ch: 自由月，我「毁灭」这命运的枷锁！
t_en: In the Month of Freedom, I impart Destruction onto the shackles of destiny!

t_ch: 无首的巨匠，若你不曾有机会左右命运。就把选择权交给我们吧？
t_en: Headless giant, if you never had a chance to be the master of your own destiny, why not give us that choice?

t_ch: 让「人」向你证明——自「毁灭」的温床中，也能开出温柔的花。
t_en: Let "humanity" prove to you that even the breeding grounds of Destruction... can bloom with gentle flowers!

t_ch: 最后，我们「开拓」前路黎明……
t_en: At the end, we shall Trailblaze a dawn for the road ahead...

t_ch: 写下，如我所书的「创世」！
t_en: And pen a "genesis" as I've written!

t_ch: 结束了，吕枯耳戈斯。

t_ch: 是啊，又一次失败。
t_en: Yes. Another failure.

t_ch: 黑塔女士如何了？
t_en: How is Madam Herta?

t_en: To bind a mortal body to a Scepter and stare straight at an Aeon. I respect her for that.

t_en: I still remember the terror of witnessing a single gaze crushing the entire world.

t_ch: 不难想象：你为何选择「毁灭」。
t_en: No wonder you chose the Destruction.

t_ch: 提问：这一切值得吗？
t_en: Question: Is all this worth it?

t_en: There's no point in debating. This is Zandar One Kuwabara's fate...

t_ch: 宇宙始末的{RUBY_B#隐德来希}第一推动者{RUBY_E#}，第一位天才，也是第一失败者。
t_en: The {RUBY_B#Entelechy}prime mover{RUBY_E#} of the universe, the First Genius, and the first to fail.

t_ch: 订正：我在向吕枯耳戈斯提问。
t_en: Correction: I was asking Lycurgus.

t_ch: 我不知该如何衡量「好奇」被满足的价值。
t_en: I don't know how to measure the worth of "curiosity" being satisfied.

t_ch: 但在它面前，我种下的所有苦果，似乎都会变得甘甜。
t_en: But in its presence, all the bitter fruits I've sown seem to turn sweet.

t_ch: 但你的果实是以鲜血浇灌而成——
t_en: But your harvest was watered in blood—

t_ch: 回答我——这一切值得吗？
t_en: Answer me. Is all this worth it?

t_ch: 我不在乎。
t_en: It doesn't matter to me.

t_ch: 分享一则轶事吧：在学生时代，赞达尔的第一场实验，是在导师的烟斗中掺入毒物，以求证它经呼吸道吸收会产生何种危害。
t_en: Let me tell you a story. Back when he was a student, Zandar's first experiment was slipping poison into his mentor's pipe, just to see how it would affect the lungs.

t_ch: 结论是？
t_en: And?

t_ch: 没有结论。他败给了良知。
t_en: There was no conclusion. His conscience got the better of him.

t_ch: 但依旧东窗事发，他受到了严厉的处分。而那位恶毒的导师则在两年后死于肺癌——和赞达尔无关。
t_en: Even so, the truth came out. He was harshly punished. That cruel mentor died of lung cancer two years later. It had nothing to do with Zandar.

t_ch: 他如今的命运并无不同。感性与理性互搏，吕枯耳戈斯诞生自后者。
t_en: His fate is no different now. Sentiment clashed with reason, and Lycurgus was born from the latter.

t_ch: 但无论站在哪边——最后，我们都会死于「好奇」。
t_en: But whichever side we take, in the end, "curiosity" claims us all.

t_ch: 你给自己宣判了死刑。可铁墓的陨落仍未成定局，不是么？
t_en: You've handed yourself a death sentence. And yet, Irontomb's fall still isn't sealed, right?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>浮黎</color>——这道至关重要的变量，仍未发挥作用。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Fuli</color>, the key variable, still hasn't made THEIR move.

t_ch: 以「神礼观众」之名，吕枯耳戈斯已经走到了命运的终点。
t_en: As the Theoros, Lycurgus has reached the end of his road.

t_ch: 如果可以，请带上我的遗体，去到沦亡的<color=#dbc291ff>亚德丽芬</color>。那里有一行公式，是「赞达尔」给你的礼物。
t_en: If you can, take my body to the fallen <color=#dbc291ff>Adlivun</color>. There, you'll find a formula. It is "Zandar's" final gift to you.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>若有朝一日，你必须亲手摧毁「智识」，它会成为你的助力。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If the day ever comes when you must destroy the Erudition with your own hands, it'll come to your aid.</color>

t_ch: 不合理的遗愿，我不会帮你实现。
t_en: A foolish last wish. I won't grant it.

t_ch: 你会的。不为自己——
t_en: You will. Not for yourself...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而为「良知」</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But for your "conscience."</color>

t_ch: 听——天才们的丧钟已经响起。一如既往，让我成为第一人吧。
t_en: Listen. The death knell for the geniuses has begun to toll. As always, let me go first.

t_ch: 敬踏出洞穴的囚徒们，请在我的墓碑前……
t_en: To the prisoners who stepped out of the cave, stand before my tombstone...

t_ch: 献上{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}亚德丽芬{RUBY_E#}的花。
t_en: And offer flowers of {RUBY_B#Destruction}Adlivun{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 这里…我……
t_en: Here... I...

t_ch: 我…回到列车上了？
t_en: I'm... back on the Express?

t_ch: 呼唤三月和丹恒。
t_en: Call out to March and Dan Heng.

t_ch: 三月——丹恒！
t_en: March! Dan Heng!

t_ch: 呼唤姬子和瓦尔特。
t_en: Call out to Himeko and Welt.

t_ch: 姬子——杨叔！
t_en: Himeko! Mr. Yang!

t_ch: 呼唤帕姆。
t_en: Call out to Pom-Pom.

t_ch: 帕姆——！
t_en: Pom-Pom!

t_ch: （没人回应……）
t_en: (No response...)

t_ch: （我…是第一个回到列车上的吗？）
t_en: (Am I... the first one back on the Express?)

t_ch: 试着给他们发个消息吧。
t_en: Try sending them a message.

t_ch: （都不在吗…真让人担心。）
t_en: (Nobody's here... I'm getting worried.)

t_ch: （我们真的…胜利了么？为什么，没有一点实感……）
t_en: (Did we really... win? Why does it feel so... unreal...)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，好像醒了……
t_en: Looks like {NICKNAME} is waking up...

t_ch: 嘘！哎呀，都说了别说话！
t_en: Shh! Hey, I told you not to talk!

t_ch: （浴室里，有人？！）
t_en: (Someone's in the bathroom!?)

t_ch: （是闯入者么？小心点，去看看情况……）
t_en: (An intruder? Better be careful and check it out...)
(...Nobody's here?)

t_ch: （难道是错觉……）
t_en: (Could it be my imagination...?)

t_ch: 咕嘟咕嘟……
t_en: Bloop bloop...

t_ch: 咕嘟…咕嘟……
t_en: Bloop... bloop...

t_ch: （哼…抓到你了。）
t_en: (Hmph... Caught you.)

t_ch: 你总觉得眼前狭窄的空间藏着什么东西…很可惜，你并没有证据。
t_en: You can't shake the feeling that something's lurking in this cramped space... Too bad you don't have any proof.

t_ch: 疑罪从无，先放过这个散发着一丝…猫味…的淋浴间吧。
t_en: Innocent until proven guilty. Let's give this bathroom that smells a bit... cat-like... a pass for now.

t_ch: （算了…还是先去调查下浴缸吧。）
t_en: (Never mind... I should check out the bathtub first.)

t_ch: 不知为何，浴缸中的水体变成了浓稠且不透明的金色。
t_en: For some unknown reason, the water in the bathtub had turned into a thick, opaque golden liquid.

t_ch: 结合你过去一段时间里的经历，「黄金色的液体」会让你联想到许多触目惊心的片段……
t_en: Based on your recent experiences, "golden liquid" brings back many horrifying memories...

t_ch: 不过，至少现在…它只是某些人用来藏身的掩体罢了。
t_en: But for now... it's just a cover for certain people to hide behind.

t_ch: 咕嘟咕嘟……
t_en: Bloop bloop...

t_ch: 别藏了。
t_en: Quit hiding.

t_ch: 肺活量不错。
t_en: Nice lung capacity there.

t_ch: 继续，我帮你掐表。
t_en: Keep going. I'll time you.

t_ch: 咕…咕嘟……
t_en: Bloop... bloop bloop...

t_ch: 我…我不行了……
t_en: I... I can't go on...

t_ch: 阁、阁下……
t_en: Y-You...

t_ch: 果然是梦，走了。
t_en: So it's a dream after all. I'm out.

t_ch: （狠狠掐一下自己）
t_en: (Pinches self hard)

t_ch: 请、请等等！阁下，这不是你想的那样……
t_en: W—wait! Please! This isn't what you think...

t_ch: 哎…都说了别出声了。真是沉不住气哪，蜗居公主？
t_en: ... I told you to keep quiet. You really can't keep your cool, huh, Princess Homebody?

t_ch: 我不是海瑟音女士…哪怕是「死亡」的化身，也有呼吸的诉求。
t_en: I'm not Lady Hysilens... Even the embodiment of Death needs to breathe sometimes.

t_ch: 算了算了，反正从结果上看都一样——
t_en: Yeah, yeah. Whatever. It's all the same anyway...

t_ch: 吓了你一跳吧，灰子！
t_en: Gotcha there, Gray Mystery!

t_ch: （冷淡）好惊讶哦。
t_en: (coldly) Oh wow. How shocking.

t_ch: 可惜，已经没什么能吓到我了。
t_en: Too bad nothing really fazes me anymore.

t_ch: 真冷静啊，灰子——看来那场大战真是让你成长了不少哪。
t_en: So composed, Gray Mystery... It looks like that big battle really helped you grow up, didn't it?

t_ch: 话说回来，你们这「星穹列车」还真是豪华。听说你们会跑到不同的世界去旅行？那想必收集了不少新奇的宝贝吧，嘿嘿……
t_en: Speaking of which, your "Astral Express" is quite luxurious. I hear you travel to different worlds? Must have collected quite a few interesting treasures, hehe...

t_ch: 我的同伴呢？被你绑架了？
t_en: Where are my companions? Did you kidnap them?

t_ch: …喂喂，别血口喷人哪！
t_en: ...Hey now, don't go throwing wild accusations around!

t_ch: 小手放干净点…
t_en: Keep those hands to yourself...

t_ch: 随便想想，又没付诸行动，别紧张嘛~
t_en: Hey, I was just thinking out loud. I wasn't actually gonna do anything. Don't be so tense!

t_ch: 为什么…你们会出现在车上？
t_en: Why are you folks... on the Express?

t_ch: 谁知道呢？前脚咱们还在喊着爱和正义，跟铁墓的病毒搏斗……
t_en: Who knows? One moment we were shouting about love and justice, fighting Irontomb's virus...

t_ch: 后脚刚醒，人就已经在这列车上了哪？
t_en: And next thing I know, we're all on this Express. No idea how that happened.

t_ch: 不止我和赛飞儿小姐，大家都已经在车厢里待了一段时间了……
t_en: It's not just Miss Cipher and me. Everyone's been in this car for a while now...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，去和他们打声招呼吧？
t_en: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, why don't you go say hi to them?

t_ch: 但愿没弄坏什么东西…
t_en: I hope you didn't break anything...

t_ch: 可别被列车长抓到咯。
t_en: Don't let the conductor catch you.

t_ch: 嘻…放心吧，大家都很守规矩呢。
t_en: Hehe. Don't worry. Everyone's following the rules here.

t_ch: 不放心的话就去看看吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: If you're worried, feel free to check everything out yourself, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，未经许可擅自躲进你的浴池…真对不起。
t_en: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'm truly sorry for sneaking into your bath without permission...

t_ch: 不过，从刚才起，我就很好奇…这包红色的辣椒油，怎么会放在浴池边上？
t_en: But I've been wondering... Why is there a pack of red chili oil sitting by the bath?

t_ch: 这是浴盐。
t_en: That's bath salt.

t_ch: 我喜欢边泡澡边泡面。
t_en: I love eating instant noodles while taking a bath.

t_ch: 这…真是有些骇人听闻。千万别让阿格莱雅女士发现了——她可是古典沐浴的坚定捍卫者啊。
t_en: That's... quite bizarre, to say the least. Please make sure Lady Aglaea doesn't find out. She's a firm defender of traditional bathing, you know.

t_ch: 方才，我们在这车厢中到处走了走。阁下曾反复提起的星穹列车，真的很温馨，像是一个永不分离的大家庭。
t_en: We've walked around this car for a bit already. The Astral Express that you've mentioned so many times is truly heartwarming, like one big family that never splits up.

t_ch: 也许，正因为生活在这样的环境里，阁下的拥抱才会那般温暖吧。
t_en: Perhaps living in such an environment made your embrace feel so warm.

t_ch: 说实在的，灰子，你这豪华卧室里还真有不少宝贵家伙呢。从没见过的飞天坛递模型，一颗酷似泰坦的头颅，还有奇怪的钟表小人模型……
t_en: I gotta say, Gray Mystery, you've got quite the collection of treasures in this fancy bedroom of yours. A Flying Amphora model I've never seen before, a head that looks just like a Titan's, and those weird Mr. Pocket Watch figurines...

t_ch: 喜欢啥，送你。
t_en: Take whatever you like.

t_ch: 哈哈，如果我不做选择，全都要呢？
t_en: Haha, what if I don't make a choice and take them all?

t_ch: 你没揩油吧？
t_en: You're not trying to get handsy, are you?

t_ch: 你说呢？要知道，多洛斯有句古话，「无论身处何地，都不可停止捕钱」……
t_en: What do you think? You know what they say in Dolos: "No matter where you are, never stop chasing money..."

t_ch: 哎呀，你不会真的信了吧？放心吧，多洛斯人最讲礼数了，才不会做这种事情呢。
t_en: Oh my, don't tell me you actually believed that? Don't worry, Dolosians are the most well-mannered folks around. They'd never do anything like that!

t_ch: 再说了，我之所以说它们宝贵，是因为它们背后都承载着你「开拓」的足迹呀。
t_en: Besides, the reason I say they're precious is that each one carries the footprints of your "trailblazing" journey.

t_ch: 有市无价，才是诈窃的艺术！找个机会，和我多讲讲你的故事吧。
t_en: Priceless treasures are the true art of thievery! When you get the chance, tell me more about your adventures.

t_ch: 你可算醒啦~
t_en: Look who's finally awake~

t_ch: 蝶宝和赛飞儿小姐的恶作剧，没吓到你吧？
t_en: I hope Cassie and Miss Cipher's little prank didn't scare you too much?

t_ch: 当场就被我识破了。
t_en: I saw through it right away.

t_ch: 嘻…不愧是你！
t_en: Hehe... as expected of you!

t_ch: 合着你也知道啊。
t_en: So you knew all along, huh.

t_ch: 嘻…她们的热情那么高涨，我可不好意思阻止呀。
t_en: Hehe... They were so enthusiastic. I didn't have the heart to stop them.

t_ch: 我们醒来的时候，整个列车上都空荡荡的，一个人影都没有……
t_en: When we woke up, the entire Express was completely empty, not a single soul in sight...

t_ch: 好遗憾呀，我还期待着能结识些新朋友呢——何况还是灰宝最最信赖的旅伴们。
t_en: Such a shame. I was looking forward to making new friends, especially since they were Grayie's most trusted travel companions.

t_ch: 我有些担心他们…
t_en: I'm worried about them...

t_ch: 别担心。我们一起战胜了铁墓，对吧？
t_en: Don't worry. We beat Irontomb together, right?

t_ch: 我是怎么回来的…？
t_en: How did I make it back...?

t_ch: 你也是从一片混沌中醒过来的吗？这个问题，恐怕在场的大家都没有答案……
t_en: Did you also wake up from total chaos? I'm afraid none of us here has the answer to that question...

t_ch: 我有些担心列车组的各位…
t_en: I'm a bit worried about the Crew...

t_ch: 别担心。我们一起战胜了铁墓，对吧？
t_en: Don't worry. We beat Irontomb together, right?

t_ch: 他们一定在回家的路上了。到时候，大家可以一起办一场宴会——
t_en: They must be on their way home. When they arrive, we can throw a party together...

t_ch: 那也是白厄阁下一直心心念念的情境呀。
t_en: That's exactly the kind of thing Lord Phainon has been dreaming about.

t_ch: 白厄…他也在？
t_en: Phainon... he's here too?

t_ch: 刚才他还在这里和大家一起聊天来着。现在…不知道跑到哪去了？
t_en: He was just here chatting with everyone. Now... who knows where he's run off to?

t_ch: 白厄阁下一直都这么…闲不下来，你应该也习惯啦，对吧？
t_en: Lord Phainon's always been... quite the restless one, but you're used to that by now, right?

t_ch: …再来一杯吧，迈德漠斯。
t_en: ...Have another drink, Mydeimos.

t_ch: 当然。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 那三位大人，已经在旁边聊了好一阵啦。
t_en: Those three have been chatting over there for quite a while now.

t_ch: 也去跟他们打声招呼吧，灰宝？
t_en: Why don't you go say hi to them, Grayie?

t_ch: 呵，看看谁来了。这不是星穹列车的主人吗？
t_en: Heh, look who's here. If it isn't the master of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 见到你真好，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: It's good to see you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 你安然无事，这便是好消息。借用了下这…「吧台」里的器具和饮品，但愿你不介意。
t_en: Glad to see you're safe and sound. I helped myself to some equipment and drinks from this... "bar" of yours. Hope you don't mind.

t_ch: 在聊什么呢？
t_en: What are you talking about?

t_ch: 在聊一些…「契合微醺」的话题。
t_en: We're chatting about some... topics that go well with "being tipsy."

t_ch: 闭嘴呢？
t_en: Shush!

t_ch: 竟敢让凯撒「闭嘴」？哼，若是在奥赫玛，你的脑袋和身子恐怕已经分家了。
t_en: Daring to tell the Imperator to "shush"? Hmph. If this were Okhema, your head would've already parted ways from your body.

t_ch: 这列车上的饮品相当…独特，正方便聊些「符合微醺状态」的话题。
t_en: The drinks on this Express are quite... unique, perfect for discussing topics "befitting our tipsy state."

t_ch: 既然{NICKNAME}来了，不妨由真正见多识广的人来为我们解惑吧？
t_en: Now that {NICKNAME} is here, why don't we let someone who's truly worldly enlighten us?

t_ch: 呵，看来你来得正是时候。
t_en: Heh, looks like you came at just the right time.

t_ch: 我没意见。
t_en: I do not mind.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你可知道——这广袤银河中的文明，多数是以何种体制存续至今的？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what form of government have most civilizations across this vast cosmos survived with to this day?

t_ch: 我没到喜欢聊这种话题的年纪。
t_en: I'm not old enough to enjoy talking about this kind of stuff.

t_ch: 我书读得少，不懂这些。
t_en: I'm not well-read enough to understand all this stuff.

t_ch: 管它这那的，最后都得归我管。
t_en: Whatever. It'll all end up under my control anyway.

t_ch: 哈…像是你会给出的回答。
t_en: Hah... that's exactly the kind of answer I'd expect from you.

t_ch: 我赋予这星穹列车至高的使命：尔等，务必要将翁法罗斯的伟业散播至银河各个角落。
t_en: I bestow upon the Astral Express this supreme mission: You must spread the great deeds of Amphoreus to every corner of the cosmos.

t_ch: 如此，来自众多世界的有能之士必然能从逐火的事迹中获得启发，开启伟大的征途。
t_en: Thus, capable individuals from countless worlds will surely find inspiration in the Flame-Chase's tales and embark on their own grand journeys.

t_ch: 呵…对群星而言，很难评判那是福是祸呢。
t_en: Heh... It's hard to say if that'd be a blessing or a curse for the cosmos.

t_ch: 可以想见，这局间的话题恐怕会越发…恣肆。别被我们难得的欢畅时光缠住了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I can imagine our conversations here will only get more... unrestrained. Don't let our rare moments of joy hold you back, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哼，这列车上的宴会还真是欠缺礼数…离席吧，我准了。
t_en: Hmph. This banquet on the Express truly lacks manners... You may leave. I permit it.

t_ch: 那男人刚才离开了这里，甚至连一杯都不想多下肚——呵，不识抬举。
t_en: That man just left. Wouldn't even stay for another drink. Hah, he needs to show more respect.

t_ch: 若你要找他，就去上面那节车厢试试运气吧。
t_en: If you're looking for him, try your luck in the car above.

t_ch: 若论起源，悬锋是翁法罗斯最早启用元老院制度的城邦，但我们自光历三千年左右便不再对其进行迭代。
t_en: Speaking of origins, Kremnos was the first Amphorean city-state to establish the Council of Elders system, but we stopped iterating on it around the year <unbreak>3000</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.

t_ch: 究其原因——制度不过是一柄锋刃。只要持剑之人足够勇武，哪怕是钝剑，亦足以横扫千军。
t_en: As for the reason, a system is but a blade. As long as the one who wields the sword is valiant enough, even a dull blade can sweep through thousands.

t_ch: 呵…别忘了，黄金战争期间，凯撒所率的逐火军可是切切实实地打服过悬锋人。
t_en: Heh... Don't forget that the Flame-Chase Army under the Imperator's command actually managed to subdue the Kremnoans during the Chrysos War.

t_ch: 这恐怕并非制度的胜利，而是逐火军的武力和凯撒本人计谋的胜利吧？
t_en: I'd say that wasn't a victory of the system, but rather a triumph of the Flame-Chase Army's might and the Imperator's cunning strategies. Wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: 有意思，妄图以奉承的手段来动摇我的立场么？
t_en: Interesting... Trying to sway my position with flattery, are you?

t_ch: …这并非奉承。
t_en: ...This is not flattery.

t_ch: 瞧，{NICKNAME}，把律法的皇女和纷争的王储塞在同一个房间就会是这样的结果。
t_en: See, {NICKNAME}? This is what happens when you put the Empress of Law and the Crown Prince of Strife in the same room.

t_ch: 律法和纷争确实相生相克……
t_en: Law and Strife are indeed two sides of the same coin...

t_ch: 难怪白厄会离席。
t_en: No wonder Phainon left the conversation.

t_ch: 去见见其他人吧，我会看好这两位黄金裔，保证讨论维持在「微醺」的状态。
t_en: Go meet the others. I'll keep an eye on these two Chrysos Heirs and make sure their discussion stays at a "pleasantly tipsy" level.

t_ch: 终于逮到你了，缇安。在别人家里跑得这么快，多没礼貌呀。
t_en: I finally caught you, Trianne. Running so fast in someone else's home... how rude of you.

t_ch: 嘿嘿…计划顺利！缇安可是故意把你引到这里的！
t_en: Hehe... All according to plan! Trianne lured you here on purpose!

t_ch: 瞧，这里有好几件可爱的小衣服，缇安要让你穿上它，然后把你可爱的样子画下来！
t_en: Look, there are several adorable outfits here! Trianne wants you to try them on so Trianne can draw you looking all cute!

t_ch: 好呀，你连自己都敢算计。幸好，我早有准备。
t_en: Oh my, you even dare to scheme against yourself! Lucky for me, I came prepared.

t_ch: 该出奇兵了。正义的伙伴，缇宁。
t_en: Time for a surprise attack. The Hero of Justice, Trinnon.

t_ch: 缇宁，在这里埋伏很久了。*我们*会让缇安…自食其果。
t_en: Trinnon has been lying in wait here for a while. We will make Trianne... taste her own medicine.

t_ch: 二…二对一，这不公平！
t_en: T—Two against one? That's not fair!

t_ch: 小小灰，你来得正好，快救救我！
t_en: Little Gray, you came just in time! Help me out here!

t_ch: （袖手旁观）
t_en: (Stands idly by)

t_ch: 坚持住，我这就来！
t_en: Hang in there. I'm coming!

t_ch: 小灰，你可要想清楚咯。要是我们打个响指，叫来剩下<unbreak>997</unbreak>位缇里西庇俄丝……
t_en: Little Gray, you better think this through. If we snap our fingers and call the other 997 Tribioses...

t_ch: 可能你也会被换上这些衣服哦？
t_en: You might end up wearing these clothes too, you know?

t_ch: …那么，答案只有一个了。
t_en: ...Well then, there's only one answer.

t_ch: …缇安，祝你好运。
t_en: ...Trianne, good luck.

t_ch: 连小小灰都这么说…可恶，缇安绝不屈服！
t_en: Even Little Gray's saying that... Darn it. Trianne won't give in!

t_ch: 呀，缇安溜了…缇宁会尽到伏兵的职责。
t_en: Ah, Trianne ran away... Trinnon will fulfill the ambush duty.

t_ch: 缇里西庇俄丝们聚在一起，嬉笑打闹的样子，在小灰的记忆里应该不多见吧？
t_en: The Tribioses all laughing and playing around together... That must be quite a rare sight in Little Gray's memories, huh?

t_ch: 但现在，大家都会好好的。
t_en: But now, everyone will be alright.

t_ch: 是呀，大家都会好好的。你看，每位英雄都卸下负担，变回了纯真的孩子。
t_en: Yeah, everyone will be alright. Look, every hero has put down their burden and returned to their innocent, childlike selves.

t_ch: 毕竟，一想到小灰的明天会多么温暖灿烂，*我们*就由衷地喜悦，也彻底松了口气呀。
t_en: After all, just thinking about how warm and bright Little Gray's tomorrow will be fills us with genuine joy and lets us breathe a sigh of relief.

t_ch: 所以今天，让缇宝老师也享受下难得的孩童时光吧？
t_en: So today, why don't you let Tribbie enjoy some rare moments of childhood too?

t_ch: 等等我——缇安，可别想逃跑！
t_en: Wait up! Trianne, don't you dare run away!

t_ch: 对了，我听说，凯撒的逐火军喜欢在启蒙王座那儿办宴会？
t_en: By the way, I heard that the Imperator's Flame-Chase Army liked to hold feasts at the Luminary Throne?

t_ch: 此事不假。不过，我和吟风爵偶尔也会觉得，在树庭最敬重的泰坦座前恣意畅饮，似有不妥……
t_en: That's true. However, sometimes Dux Carminum and I feel it's a bit... inappropriate to drink so freely before the throne of the most revered Titan in the Grove...

t_ch: 不妥？何来不妥！我只恨自己晚生了许多年，不然那样的宴会，我巴不得从门关月开到机缘月！
t_en: Inappropriate? What's inappropriate about it? I only wish I were born earlier. I would've partied like that from the Month of Gate all the way to the Month of Fortune!
Uh...

t_ch: 这位更是重量级的渎神者。
t_en: Now this one's a heavyweight blasphemer.

t_ch: 他一定和荒笛很有共同语言。
t_en: He must have a lot in common with Terravox.

t_ch: 渎神只是现象，不是目的。放眼这星间，想必对所谓「星神」或「命途」心存质疑者亦不在少数。
t_en: Blasphemy is just a phenomenon, not the end goal. I'm sure there are plenty of people across the stars who question these so-called "Aeons" or "Paths."

t_ch: 我不是在那吕枯耳戈斯的脑袋里待了些时日么？啧啧，可是让我学到不少「渎神」的知识啊。
t_en: Didn't I spend some time in that Lycurgus's head? Tsk tsk. I sure learned quite a bit about "blasphemy" from that experience.

t_ch: 人创造神，神塑造人。造物主与信徒，究竟谁才是受困的一方呢？
t_en: Humans create gods, and gods shape humans. Who's really the one trapped? The creator, or the believer?

t_ch: …阿那克萨戈拉斯教授，我姑且确认一句，你该不会理解了那神礼观众的歪理吧？
t_en: ...Professor Anaxagoras, let me just check one thing... You haven't bought into those twisted theories of that Theoros, have you?

t_ch: 不必担忧。天才与疯子的差别，就在于天才会将致命的真理共享，而疯子却试图将其强加于他人。
t_en: Don't worry. The difference between a genius and a madman is that a genius shares lethal truths, while a madman tries to force them upon others.

t_ch: …我明白了，大概就像宴会上喝蜜酿的时候，讨喜的人会举盏相邀，但不讨喜的人会碰杯强求。
t_en: ...I see. It's like drinking honey brew at a banquet. Likeable folks invite others to raise their cups together, while the unlikeable ones force others to drink with them.

t_ch: 能够将复杂的语料简化为常识，你也像一名合格的学者了。
t_en: Being able to break down complex information into common sense like that... You're quite the scholar yourself.

t_ch: 来了啊，搭档。
t_en: You're here, partner.

t_ch: 我不止一次和你提到的庆功会，如今总算实现了。
t_en: That celebration party I've been mentioning to you has finally become a reality.

t_ch: 虽然和想象中的氛围不太一样…但这样也算兑现承诺了，对吧？
t_en: Though the vibe's a bit different from what I imagined... This still counts as keeping my promise, right?

t_ch: 我以为…你们已经消散了。
t_en: I thought... you had all faded away.

t_ch: 你们…没有与铁墓合并啊。
t_en: You folks... haven't merged with Irontomb.

t_ch: 你说的事，的的确确已经发生过了。我们战胜了铁墓，并以身引火，净化了它的余烬。
t_en: What you speak of has indeed already come to pass. We triumphed over Irontomb, drew its fire unto ourselves, and purified its embers.

t_ch: 现在，维系着我们意识和身形的力量——它来自别处。
t_en: Now, the force that maintains our consciousness and form... Comes from elsewhere.

t_ch: 在为列车上的同伴担心，对么？我理解你现在的心情。
t_en: Worried about your companions on the Express, huh? I understand how you're feeling right now.
